name: Legend Holdings Corporation
summary: Legend Holdings Corporation, an diversified investment holding company, together with its subsidiaries, operates in information technology (IT), financial services, innovative consumption and services, agriculture and food, advanced manufacturing and professional services, and financial investments businesses in the People's Republic of China and internationally. The company's IT segment develops, manufactures, and markets technology products and services to customers and enterprises. Its Financial Services segment offers banking, short-term financing, financial leasing, insurance brokerage, third party payment, internet finance, property insurance, and other related business services. The company's Innovative Consumption and Services segment provides medical and health services, car rental business, and education services for kids. Its Agriculture and Food segment plants and sells fruit and tea products; produces and sells salmon and Chinese liquor; supplies seafood and accessory products; and operates liquor direct sales chain business. The company's Advanced Manufacturing and Professional Services segment provides chemicals and energy materials production; and logistics, and aviation logistic related business services. Its Financial Investments segment invests in private equity and venture capital funds as a limited partner; holds interest in the general partners of various funds; makes angel investments in technology start-ups, as well as minority investments in other entities; and provides office rental services. The company also develops car management software; provides car services information consultant and medical consultation services; and engages in real estate investment and asset management businesses. In addition, it engages in agriculture and food investment; foods trading activities; and offers other animal protein-related products. The company was incorporated in 1984 and is headquartered in Beijing, the People's Republic of China.
